policy: Expanded snippets do not promote candidates. They only strengthen display and audit of rows already in authoritative_scope_rows.

records.snippet_en: pholding a non-deforestation commitment and encouraging best agricultural practices, Bunge is preventing emissions and promoting the sequestration of carbon with established forests and regenerative agriculture. Deforestation and conversion are types of LUC and a large contributor of carbon emissions to Bunge’s Scope 3 carbon footprint. To calculate and manage emissions, Bunge uses third-party satellite monitoring and collects data to seek to enable compliance with our non-deforestation and conversion commitment. Comprehensive traceability2 and monitoring help us to accurately track and manage the emissions. 2024 total GHG emissions 867,115 Scope 2 1,665,988 Scope 1 136,679,303 Scope 3 1.2 % 0.6% 98.2% Scope 3 GHG Emissions Reduction (tons of CO2e) in Our SBT Boundary 2020 2024 2030 Target 102,064,050 95,240,245 89,510,172 Scope 3 GHG Emissions Breakdown Processing of sold goods End of life Others 21.0% 69.7% 6.5% 2.8% SBT: Target Categories 62.3% Purchased Goods and Services 5.9% Upstream Logistics 1.5% Fuel and Energy- Related Activities 24 Bunge 2025 Global Sustainability Report Resource Efficiency Carbon Solutions RESPONSIBLE SUPPLY CHAINS ACCOUNTABILITY TABLES AND INDICES ACTION ON CLIMATE GOVERNANCE INTRODUCTION Decarbonization

records.snippet_en: sment Report. By upholding a non-deforestation commitment and encouraging best agricultural practices, Bunge is preventing emissions and promoting the sequestration of carbon with established forests and regenerative agriculture. Deforestation and conversion are types of LUC and a large contributor of carbon emissions to Bunge’s Scope 3 carbon footprint. To calculate and manage emissions, Bunge uses third-party satellite monitoring and collects data to seek to enable compliance with our non-deforestation and conversion commitment. Comprehensive traceability2 and monitoring help us to accurately track and manage the emissions. 2024 total GHG emissions 867,115 Scope 2 1,665,988 Scope 1 136,679,303 Scope 3 1.2 % 0.6% 98.2% Scope 3 GHG Emissions Reduction (tons of CO2e) in Our SBT Boundary 2020 2024 2030 Target 102,064,050 95,240,245 89,510,172 Scope 3 GHG Emissions Breakdown Processing of sold goods End of life Others 21.0% 69.7% 6.5% 2.8% SBT: Target Categories 62.3% Purchased Goods and Services 5.9% Upstream Logistics 1.5% Fuel and Energy- Related Activities 24 Bunge 2025 Global Sustainability Report Resource Efficiency Carbon Solutions RESPONSIBLE SUPPLY CHAINS ACCOUNTABILITY TABLES AND INDICES ACTION ON CLIMATE GOVERNANCE INTRODUCTION Decarbonization
records.snippet_zh: sment Report. Deforestation and conversion are types of LUC and a large contributor of carbon emissions to Bunge’s Scope 3 carbon footprint. To calculate and manage emissions, Bunge uses third-party satellite monitoring and collects data to seek to enable compliance with our non-deforestation and conversion commitment. Comprehensive traceability2 and monitoring help us to accurately track and manage the emissions. 2024 total GHG emissions 867,115 Scope 2 1,665,988 Scope 1 136,679,303 Scope 3 1.2 % 0.6% 98.2% Scope 3 GHG Emissions Reduction (tons of CO2e) in Our SBT Boundary 2020 2024 2030 Target 102,064,050 95,240,245 89,510,172 Scope 3 GHG Emissions Breakdown Processing of sold goods End of life Others 21.0% 69.7% 6.5% 2.8% SBT: Target Categories 62.3% Purchased Goods and Services 5.9% Upstream Logistics 1.5% Fuel and Energy- Related Activities 24 Bunge 2025 Global Sustainability Report Resource Efficiency Carbon Solutions RESPONSIBLE SUPPLY CHAINS ACCOUNTABILITY TABLES AND INDICES ACTION ON CLIMATE GOVERNANCE INTRODUCTION Decarbonization
